items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the countrymen on World Health Day
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah extends greetings to the countrymen on World Health Day Good health is a choice which we can maintain with proper care On this occasion let us all dedicate ourselves to building a healthy and robust society through adequate care, healthy food habits and regular exercise Posted On: 07 A…

items.title: EPFO’s DR EO/AO Batch 2025 Commences NLU Phase of Induction Training at GNLU, Gandhinagar
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Labour & Employment EPFO’s DR EO/AO Batch 2025 Commences NLU Phase of Induction Training at GNLU, Gandhinagar Posted On: 07 APR 2026 1:01PM by PIB Delhi The second batch of the National Law University (NLU) Phase of the Induction Training Programme for Direct Recruit Enforcement Officers/Accounts Officers (EO/AO), Batch 2025 of the Employees’ Provident Fund Or…
